name: Scallops, Grilled on a Spinach Bed
recipeIngredient: 1 can water chestnuts, canned, drained - sliced
1 package fresh spinach, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a large skillet over moderate-high heat.
2. Add scallops and cook until slightly firm to touch while remaining milky white. Remove scallops from the skillet.
3. Saute mushrooms in 1-2 tablespoons butter in the same skillet. Add ginger and water chestnuts. Reduce liquid by half. Add juice of 1 lemon or to taste.
4. Remove from heat and quickly stir in 3-4 tablespoons chilled butter. This will allow the sauce to thicken.
5. Return scallops to the skillet and heat thoroughly.
6. In a large bowl, sprinkle spinach with remaining lemon juice and drizzle with canola oil. Cover with wax paper and microwave on high for approximately 1 minute. Arrange wilted leaves on each plate, top with scallops and sauce.
